_doc: Privilege snapshot baseline — consumed by privilege-snapshot.test.ts. This is an ALLOWLIST: when a migration intentionally changes the privilege surface (adds an org-scoped table, a policy, a deny-all table, or a SECURITY DEFINER function), update the matching list here IN THE SAME PR so the change is reviewed. An accidental change (RLS turned off, a rogue SECURITY DEFINER function, a new org table with no RLS) turns the test red because it was NOT mirrored here. Scope is the public schema only — Postgres roles are platform-managed by Supabase and diverge across CI/local/prod, so they are deliberately out of scope (see docs/adr/0000-stufe-und-gates.md).
